title: Custom Link for Notifications - Link to Dashboard
excerpt:
I am hoping that notifications could have an editable link attached. We have used dashboard views for account managers and creatives as I have built buttons that are relevant to each staff department. 
However, when some…

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am hoping that notifications could have an editable link attached. We have used dashboard views for account managers and creatives as I have built buttons that are relevant to each staff department.

However, when someone clicks a notification from the board they land on the main board instead of on the desired dashboard so adjusting the destination url of a notification would be great!

posts.author: Tommy (Tomas Salamon)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue. I need when the user clicks on notification, it will land on the dash board, not the system board. How can we set up this feature?

posts.author: aleksandar (Aleksandar Petrov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackHeadford @Tommy

I’m dealing with the same issue—when clicking a notification, I need it to open the dashboard instead of the main board. Have you found any solution or workaround for this? I would really appreciate any help!

Thanks!
